description_long: This nightstand features a rectangular, boxy body crafted from dark wood with a rich, natural grain pattern. The front side is equipped with two spacious drawers, each fitted with a small, round knob handle for easy access. The nightstand stands on four slender, outward-angled wooden legs, giving it a mid-century modern aesthetic and elevating the main body above the ground. The sides and top are smooth and unadorned, emphasizing the clean lines and minimalist design. The overall construction appears sturdy, with the drawers seamlessly integrated into the front face. This piece is functional and stylish, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A dark wood nightstand with two drawers and round knob handles, supported by four angled legs. Its minimalist, mid-century modern design features a smooth, unadorned surface.
description_view_0: The left side of the nightstand, showing a flat, unadorned wooden surface and two angled legs.
description_view_1: The back of the nightstand, featuring a plain wooden panel and the rear view of the angled legs.
description_view_2: The front of the nightstand, displaying two drawers with round knob handles and the full leg structure.
description_view_3: The right side of the nightstand, mirroring the left with a flat wooden surface and angled legs.
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: beside a bed or against a wall
